summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TMS Rate Cards & Accessorial Charges Phase 6. All 14 API endpoints tested with 100% success rate (25/25 tests passed). Canadian-first design properly implemented with support for detention, lumper, fuel surcharge, border crossing (PARS/PAPS), and other accessorial charges.
passed_tests: GET /api/pricing/accessorials/codes - Returns all 25 standard accessorial codes including Canadian-specific (border_crossing, pars_paps)
GET /api/pricing/accessorials/defaults - Returns 19 default accessorial charges with Canadian standard rates
POST /api/pricing/accessorials - Create/update tenant-specific accessorial definition override
GET /api/pricing/accessorials - List accessorial definitions merged with defaults
PUT /api/pricing/accessorials/{code} - Update accessorial definition (rate, minimum, free time)
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards - Create rate card with lane rates and accessorial overrides
GET /api/pricing/rate-cards - List rate cards with filtering (status, customer, carrier)
GET /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id} - Get full rate card details with lane rates
PUT /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id} - Update rate card (name, FSC %, minimum)
GET /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent rate card
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id}/lanes - Add lane rate with city/province level matching
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id}/lanes - Add province-only lane rates
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id}/lanes - Validates at least one equipment rate required
DELETE /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id}/lanes/{lane_id} - Remove lane rate
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/{id}/activate - Activate rate card (draft → active)
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/quote - Get quote for matching lane with correct line haul
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/quote - Get quote with accessorial charges
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/quote - Get quote for different equipment types (reefer vs dry_van)
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/quote - Fallback to default per-km rate when no lane match
POST /api/pricing/rate-cards/quote - Returns 404 when no active rate card exists
GET /api/pricing/rate-cards/lanes/search - Search all lanes across rate cards
GET /api/pricing/rate-cards/lanes/search - Filter by origin province
GET /api/pricing/rate-cards/lanes/search - Filter by destination province
GET /api/pricing/rate-cards/lanes/search - Filter by corridor (origin + destination)
critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints properly implement tenant isolation for multi-tenant support
Rate quote calculation correctly handles fuel surcharge as percentage of line haul
Lane matching algorithm prioritizes city-level matches over province-level
Accessorial overrides properly cascade (rate card override → tenant definition → system default)
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
seed_data_creation: Created test rate cards with TEST_ prefix for various scenarios (lane rates, activation, quote testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 Rate Cards & Accessorials API fully functional. All 14 endpoints working correctly. Test tenant 'test-tenant' has multiple rate cards created during testing. Admin credentials: aminderpro@gmail.com / Admin@123!. Token field in login response is 'access_token'.

verified_features.accessorial_codes: 25 standard codes including Canadian-specific (border_crossing, pars_paps, bonded_carrier)
verified_features.default_rates: 19 default accessorial charges with Canadian standard rates (detention @$75/hr, border crossing @$200 flat)
verified_features.rate_card_crud: Create, read, update, list with filtering by status/customer/carrier
verified_features.lane_rates: Add/remove lane rates with city and province level matching
verified_features.rate_card_activation: Draft to active workflow with supersede of existing active cards
verified_features.rate_quote: Calculate quotes with lane matching, fuel surcharge, and accessorial charges
verified_features.lane_search: Search lanes across rate cards by origin/destination province
